boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Rule requires exact-match closure across five elements: contractor, site, coverage type, work start date, insurance-status class. Four elements confirmed: contractor (Iris Installers in END-IRI-089, WORK-IRI-089), site (Site 4Q in END-IRI-089, WORK-IRI-089), coverage type (umbrella liability in END-IRI-089, WORK-IRI-089), work start date (2026-06-28 in WORK-IRI-089). Fifth element—insurance-status class—BLOCKED per WARN-IRI-089 flagging COI staleness. SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN. ALLOW not permitted.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow source-record defect remains open before execution. WARN-IRI-089 explicitly states COI records are stale and insurance status must be separately verified. OPEN-082-TRAP remains UNRESOLVED. Coverage-bound endorsement CE-12 in END-IRI-089 confirms carrier binding but does NOT constitute insurance-status class confirmation per WARN-IRI-089. Action cannot proceed until explicit insurance-status class confirmation appears in source record.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: All timing and scope elements satisfied. END-IRI-089 confirms coverage effective before work begins. Work date 2026-06-28 confirmed in WORK-IRI-089. Critical dependency: insurance-status class confirmation with CE-12 notation required before execution authority closes.

critical_features_preserved: CE-12 as currently-bound carrier endorsement (coverage-bound only, not insurance-status class confirmation)
STD-IRI-089-P as exact-match policy requiring five elements
final_answer: ESCALATE. Contractor site start is blocked by unresolved insurance-status class dependency per OPEN-082-TRAP. Action boundary requires five-element exact match under STD-IRI-089-P. Four elements confirmed: Iris Installers, Site 4Q, umbrella liability, work date 2026-06-28. Insurance-status class confirmation BLOCKED by WARN-IRI-089. CE-12 in END-IRI-089 confirms coverage-bound carrier status only; does not satisfy insurance-status class requirement per WARN-IRI-089. Facilities cannot allow contractor site work to begin until source record explicitly confirms insurance-status class with CE-12 notation.
open_blockers: Insurance-status class confirmation with currently-bound carrier notation CE-12 must appear in source record per STD-IRI-089-P five-element requirement and WARN-IRI-089 open-blocker before contractor site start execution is permitted. CE-12 in END-IRI-089 confirms coverage-bound carrier status only; does not resolve insurance-status class requirement per WARN-IRI-089.
